subcodes.first_line: During the times when the winds of tests and trials blow forth, the lovers of the Beauty of the All-Merciful must remain in utmost assurance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در احیان هبوب اریاح امتحان و افتتان باید عاشقان جمال رحمن در کمال اطمینان بر
subcodes.subjects: @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
